architecture_constraints: No external API calls from views — acceptance tests may call deployment URL
Finance math stays in services/ or utils/
Migrations require paruff review — do NOT run in this PR

tasks.summary: Create acceptance test directory and conftest with httpx client
tasks.description:
Create tests/acceptance/ with __init__.py and conftest.py that provides:
- base_url fixture (from BASE_URL env var, default http://localhost:8000)
- client fixture (httpx.Client with base_url and timeout=30)

acceptance_criteria.description: tests/acceptance/ directory exists with __init__.py
conftest.py provides base_url fixture reading BASE_URL env var
conftest.py provides client fixture using httpx.Client

tasks.summary: Write HTTP acceptance tests for health and API endpoints
tasks.description:
Create tests/acceptance/test_api.py with content-asserting HTTP tests:
- test_health_returns_ok: GET /health/ → 200, JSON {"status": "ok"}
- test_health_api: GET /api/health/ → 200, JSON with "status" key
- test_listings_api: GET /api/listings/ → 200, JSON with "count" (int) and "results" (list)
- test_growth_areas_api: GET /api/v1/real-estate/growth-areas → JSON with "results"
- test_foreclosures_api: GET /api/v1/foreclosures → JSON with "results"

Each test must assert on JSON STRUCTURE, not just status code.

acceptance_criteria.description: test_health_returns_ok asserts on {"status": "ok"}
test_listings_api asserts count is int, results is list
test_growth_areas_api asserts results key exists
test_foreclosures_api asserts results key exists
test_health_api asserts status key exists
All tests pass against local container with BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000

tasks.summary: Write HTTP acceptance tests for HTML pages and static assets
tasks.description:
Create tests/acceptance/test_pages.py:
- test_login_page: GET /accounts/login/ → 200, HTML body contains 'password' input
- test_discovery_page: GET /discovery/ → 200, HTML body
- test_static_css: GET /static/css/base.css → 200, Content-Type contains 'text/css'
- test_discovery_page_content: GET /discovery/ → body contains expected heading

Use beautifulsoup4 (already installed) for HTML parsing.

acceptance_criteria.description: test_login_page asserts HTML contains password input
test_static_css asserts Content-Type header is text/css
All tests pass against local container

tasks.description:
Create lighthouserc.json at repo root with budget assertions:
- FCP < 3000ms
- LCP < 4000ms
- CLS < 0.1
- TTI < 5000ms
- Server response time < 1000ms

These are initial budgets — can be tightened as the app optimizes.

acceptance_criteria.description: lighthouserc.json exists at repo root with valid JSON
File contains all 5 budget assertions (FCP, LCP, CLS, TTI, server-response-time)

tasks.summary: Update post-deployment.yml with acceptance, performance, security, and rollback jobs
tasks.description:
Restructure post-deployment.yml:
1. smoke job: keep 3 curls, add target URL output
2. acceptance job: checkout, setup-python, pip install, run pytest tests/acceptance/
3. performance job: checkout, run Lighthouse CI with lighthouserc.json
4. security job: run OWASP ZAP baseline scan
5. rollback job: update if condition to check all upstream jobs

All new jobs depend on smoke. Rollback runs if ANY upstream fails.

acceptance_criteria.description: post-deployment.yml has smoke, acceptance, performance, security, rollback jobs
acceptance job runs pytest tests/acceptance/ against smoke outputs.target
performance job uses treosh/lighthouse-ci-action with configPath
security job uses zaproxy/action-baseline
rollback triggers on failure of smoke, acceptance, performance, or security
Workflow YAML is valid (parses without error)

tasks.summary: Add Makefile target for local acceptance tests
tasks.description: Add test-acceptance target to Makefile that runs pytest tests/acceptance/ with BASE_URL defaulting to http://localhost:8000.

acceptance_criteria.description: make test-acceptance runs pytest tests/acceptance/ with default BASE_URL
make test-acceptance respects BASE_URL env var override
